Class Stock

java.lang.Object
org.novastack.iposca.stock.Stock
public class Stock extends Object
A comprehensive class that manages the storage, retrieval and management of stock information.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    Stock.PUStockRequest
    This record contains the data required to make a PU request to take stock from CA.
    static final record 
    Stock.SAStockRequest
    This record contains the data required to make a SA request to add/update stock in CA.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Stock(int id, String name, float bulkCost, int quantity)
    Constructor for the Stock class that is used to fetch all products to display for sale.
    Stock(int id, String name, int markupRate)
    Constructor for the Stock class that is used to fetch markup rates.
    Stock(int id, String name, String productType, String packageType, String units, int unitsInAPack, float bulkCost, int quantity, int stockLimit)
    Constructor for the Stock class that is used to edit a (non-IPOS) stock item.
    Stock(int id, String name, String productType, String packageType, String units, int unitsInAPack, float bulkCost, int markupRate, int quantity, int stockLimit)
    Constructor for the Stock class that is used to fetch all stock items (comprehensive) or low-stock items.
    Stock(String name, String packageType, String units, int unitsInAPack, float bulkCost, int markupRate, int quantity, int stockLimit)
    Constructor for the Stock class that is used to add/update an IPOS stock item.

    Constructor for the Stock class that is used to create a new (non-IPOS) stock item.

  • Constructor Details

    • Stock

      public Stock(String name, String productType, String packageType, String units, int unitsInAPack, float bulkCost, int markupRate, int quantity, int stockLimit)
      Constructor for the Stock class that is used to create a new (non-IPOS) stock item.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the stock item.
      productType - The type of product (IPOS or non-IPOS, but usually always non-IPOS).
      packageType - The type of packaging for the stock item.
      units - The units of the stock item.
      unitsInAPack - The number of units in a single pack.
      bulkCost - The bulk cost of the stock item.
      markupRate - The markup rate of the stock item.
      quantity - The initial quantity of stock to add.
      stockLimit - The low stock level that triggers a warning.

    • Stock

      public Stock(String name, String packageType, String units, int unitsInAPack, float bulkCost, int markupRate, int quantity, int stockLimit)
      Constructor for the Stock class that is used to add/update an IPOS stock item.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the stock item.
      packageType - The type of packaging for the stock item.
      units - The units of the stock item.
      unitsInAPack - The number of units in a single pack.
      bulkCost - The bulk cost of the stock item.
      markupRate - The markup rate of the stock item.
      quantity - The initial/additional quantity of stock to add.
      stockLimit - The low stock level that triggers a warning.

    • Stock

      public Stock(int id, String name, String productType, String packageType, String units, int unitsInAPack, float bulkCost, int markupRate, int quantity, int stockLimit)
      Constructor for the Stock class that is used to fetch all stock items (comprehensive) or low-stock items.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the stock item.
      name - The name of the stock item.
      productType - The type of product (IPOS or non-IPOS, but usually always non-IPOS).
      packageType - The type of packaging for the stock item.
      units - The units of the stock item.
      unitsInAPack - The number of units in a single pack.
      bulkCost - The bulk cost of the stock item.
      markupRate - The markup rate of the stock item.
      quantity - The initial quantity of stock to add.
      stockLimit - The low stock level that triggers a warning.

    • Stock

      public Stock(int id, String name, String productType, String packageType, String units, int unitsInAPack, float bulkCost, int quantity, int stockLimit)
      Constructor for the Stock class that is used to edit a (non-IPOS) stock item.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the stock item.
      name - The name of the stock item.
      productType - The type of product (IPOS or non-IPOS, but usually always non-IPOS).
      packageType - The type of packaging for the stock item.
      units - The units of the stock item.
      unitsInAPack - The number of units in a single pack.
      bulkCost - The bulk cost of the stock item.
      quantity - The initial quantity of stock to add.
      stockLimit - The low stock level that triggers a warning.

    • Stock

      public Stock(int id, String name, int markupRate)
      Constructor for the Stock class that is used to fetch markup rates.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the stock item.
      name - The name of the stock item.
      markupRate - The markup rate of the stock item.

    • Stock

      public Stock(int id, String name, float bulkCost, int quantity)
      Constructor for the Stock class that is used to fetch all products to display for sale.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the stock item.
      name - The name of the stock item.
      bulkCost - The bulk cost of the stock item.
      quantity - The initial quantity of stock to add.

  • Method Details

    • createItem

      public void createItem(Stock stock)
      Adds a new non-IPOS stock item to the database.
      Parameters:
      stock - The stock item to be added.

    • upsertIPOSItem

      public static int upsertIPOSItem(Stock stock)
      Adds or updates an IPOS stock item in the database. It is invoked by Server after a SA request following successful stock order.
      Parameters:
      stock - The stock item to be added or updated.
      Returns:
      HTTP status code in relation to rows affected. 200 if the item was added successfully, 404 if the item already exists.

    • getAllStock

      public static ArrayList<Stock> getAllStock()
      Fetches all stock items from the database and is used for displaying on the debt management screen.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of Stock objects representing all stock items.

    • getAllStockForSale

      public static ArrayList<Stock> getAllStockForSale()
      Fetches all the stock in a format that can be presented to the customer for sale.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of Stock objects representing all stock items.

    • getLowStock

      public static ArrayList<Stock> getLowStock()
      Collects all stock that is below a certain threshold, references stock limit column in the table.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of Stock objects representing low stock items.

    • editStock

      public void editStock(Stock stock)
      Updates a non-IPOS product in the database.
      Parameters:
      stock - The stock item to be updated.

    • deleteItem

      public static void deleteItem(int itemId)
      Deletes a non-IPOS product from the database.
      Parameters:
      itemId - The ID of the stock item to be deleted.

    • getAllMarkupRates

      public static ArrayList<Stock> getAllMarkupRates()
      Fetches all the markup rates from the database.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of Stock objects representing all stock items (markup rates only).

    • changeMarkupRate

      public static void changeMarkupRate(int id, int markupRate)
      Changes markup rate for a specified product.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the product whose markup rate is to be changed.
      markupRate - The new markup rate to be applied.

    • minusStock

      public static int minusStock(int productID, int quantity)
      Used in sales within CA POS and PU, to deduct stock after a successful purchase.
      Parameters:
      productID - The ID of the product to be deducted.
      quantity - The quantity of stock to be deducted.
      Returns:
      HTTP status code in relation to rows affected. 200 if the stock was successfully deducted, 404 if the stock is insufficient.

    • getProductName

      public static String getProductName(int productID)
      Gets product name from the database based on product ID.
      Parameters:
      productID - The ID of the product whose name is to be fetched.

    • getId

      public int getId()

      public String getName()

      public float getBulkCost()

    • getQuantity

      public int getQuantity()

      public String getProductType()

    • getPackageType

      public String getPackageType()

    • getUnits

      public String getUnits()

    • getUnitsInAPack

      public int getUnitsInAPack()

    • getMarkupRate

      public int getMarkupRate()

    • getStockLimit

      public int getStockLimit()
